# connectionPolicy

**Instance Property**

The policy that determines who can connect to this session.

## Declaration

```swift
var connectionPolicy: MIDINetworkConnectionPolicy { get set }
```

## Connection Policies

- **MIDINetworkConnectionPolicy**

## Configuring a Session

- **default()**: Returns the default singleton session.
- **isEnabled**: A Boolean value that determines whether the session is enabled.

items.description: A Boolean value that determines whether the session is enabled.
